zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Marbury於1337年2月14日出生在英國賀福爾金頓時，他的父親Randal de Marbury26歲，母親Alicia de Randal19歲。他和Ellen Daniell至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1365年11月2日在英國史洛普爾布福德享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Marbury于1337年2月14日出生在英国賀福爾金頓时，他的父亲Randal de Marbury26岁，母亲Alicia de Randal19岁。他和Ellen Daniell至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1365年11月2日在英国史洛普爾布福德享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Marbury in Great Budworth, or, perhaps, from Marbury cum Quoisley (both in Cheshire). Both placenames derive from Old English mere ‘pool, lake’ + burh ‘fortress’ (dative byrig), ‘stronghold by the lake’.

variant of Marbrow, itself a variant of Marlborough, a habitational name from Marlborough (Wiltshire), which probably derives from an Old English personal name Mǣrla + Old English beorg ‘hill, mound’.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Marbury was born on 14 February 1337, in Kington, Herefordshire, England, his father, Randal de Marbury, was 26 and his mother, Alicia de Randal, was 19. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Ellen Daniell. He died on 2 November 1365, in Burford, Shropshire, England, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Marbury est né le 14 février 1337, à Kington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Randal de Marbury, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alicia de Randal, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Ellen Daniell. Il est décédé le 2 novembre 1365, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Marbury am 14. Februar 1337 in Kington, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Randal de Marbury 26 und seine Mutter Alicia de Randal 19. Er hatte mit Ellen Daniell mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. November 1365 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Burford, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Marbury è nato il il 14 febbraio 1337 nel Kington, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Randal de Marbury, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Alicia de Randal, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Ellen Daniell. Morì il 2 novembre 1365, nel Burford, Shropshire, England, all'età di 28 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Marbury(이)가 1337년 2월 14일 영국 허퍼드실르 킨그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Randal de Marbury(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia de Randal(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Ellen Daniell(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1365년 11월 2일 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Ellen Daniell. Ele faleceu em 2 de novembro de 1365, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Marbury родился 14 февраля 1337 г. в местности кингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Randal de Marbury было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alicia de Randal, 19. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Ellen Daniell. Он умер 2 ноября 1365 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 28 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Ellen Daniell. Murió el 2 de noviembre de 1365, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 28 años.
